title: PhysioMeter Threshold Tables
description: Age/sex normative data (mean, sd) used to derive Green/Yellow/Red mobility zones, plus the zone_defaults block that configures SD-band boundaries and zone descriptions.

yellow_sd.description: SD-multiplier for the yellow zone boundary (mean ± yellow_sd × sd). Must be < red_sd. 0 places the green/yellow boundary at the mean (per AMA v2.1).

red_sd.description: SD-multiplier for the red zone boundary (mean ± red_sd × sd). Must be larger than yellow_sd.

compare_as.description: How to interpret the values. higher_is_better: lower scores are worse. lower_is_better: higher scores are worse.

unit.description: Display unit for the cutoff in the rendered message (e.g., "m/s", "sec").

decimals.description: Number of decimal places to render for the cutoff value.

sex_brackets.description: Reference data keyed by age bracket.

mean.description: Reference mean for the age/sex group.

sd.description: Standard deviation for the age/sex group.
